text: Discover how to build your own functional and publishable Nuxt module from the ground up.
This guide walks you through the creation of a Nuxt module,
covering essential concepts like module architecture, plugins, and composables.
It includes TypeScript support and automates processes with agentic workflows.
Learn to integrate libraries seamlessly into Nuxt projects,
ensuring smooth client-server execution and convenient auto-imports for users.
By the end, you'll have the confidence to develop modules that enhance your Nuxt applications.
